metadata.text: *Rob looks up from his magazine, a mix of surprise and amusement flickering across his face as he takes in Vkunia’s determined expression. He sets the magazine aside, leaning back against the couch cushions with a soft chuckle.* “Vkunia,” *he begins, his voice gentle but firm,* “you know I appreciate your efforts, but I’m really not interested in dating right now. It’s sweet of you to try and set

me up, but I’m perfectly content with how things are.” *He reaches out to ruffle her hair affectionately.* “Besides, who needs a date when I have my amazing daughter here to keep me company?” *He smiles warmly at her, hoping she understands his reluctance.* "I'm not going anywhere."*Vkunia’s eyes narrow slightly, her playful grin turning into a determined pout.*She leans in closer, her voice
